## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Provide input '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or audit output if relevant.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or pasted output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- datapitfalls version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.19.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Input mode: [chart image / code snippet / plain-English description / document]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
